title: On compressible fluid flows of Forchheimer-type in rotating heterogeneous porous media
summary: We study the dynamics of compressible fluids in rotating heterogeneous porous media. The fluid flow is of {F}orchheimer-type and is subject to a mixed mass and volumetric flux boundary condition. The governing equations are reduced to a nonlinear partial differential equation for the pseudo-pressure. This parabolic-typed equation can be degenerate and/or singular in the spatial variables, the unknown and its gradient. We establish the $L^α$-estimate for the solutions, for any positive number $α$, in terms of the initial and boundary data and the angular speed of rotation. It requires new elliptic and parabolic Sobolev inequalities and trace theorem with multiple weights that are suitable to the nonlinear structure of the equation. The $L^\infty$-estimate is then obtained without imposing any conditions on the $L^\infty$-norms of the weights and the initial and boundary data.

AI.tldr: 建立了旋转非均匀多孔介质中可压缩流体Forchheimer型流动的伪压力方程解在任意正数α下的L^α估计
AI.motivation: 研究旋转非均匀多孔介质中可压缩流体的动力学问题，流体流动为Forchheimer型，受混合质量和体积通量边界条件约束，控制方程简化为伪压力的非线性偏微分方程
AI.techniques: 发展了新的带多重权重的椭圆和抛物Sobolev不等式、迹定理，这些权重适合方程的非线性结构；建立了L^α估计方法，无需对权重和初边值数据的L^∞范数施加条件
AI.main_theorems: 建立了伪压力方程解在任意正数α下的L^α估计，估计依赖于初边值数据和旋转角速度；获得了L^∞估计，无需对权重和初边值数据的L^∞范数施加任何条件
AI.significance: 为处理空间变量、未知函数及其梯度可能退化或奇异的非线性抛物型方程提供了新的分析框架，在渗流力学和旋转多孔介质流体动力学中有重要应用价值

title: Existence, scaling, and spectral gap for traveling fronts in the 2D renormalized Allen--Cahn equation
summary: We study the deterministic skeleton of the renormalized stochastic Allen--Cahn equation in spatial dimension $2$. For all sufficiently small regularization parameters $δ>0$, we construct monotone traveling wave front solutions connecting the renormalized equilibria, derive a small-$δ$ asymptotic description of their profile and speed, and identify the leading-order contributions. Linearizing about the wave and working in a naturally chosen weighted space, we show that there exists a spectral gap between the symmetry induced eigenvalue $0$ and the rest of the spectrum. The spectral gap grows linearly in the renormalization constant as $δ\downarrow 0$.

AI.tldr: 构造了二维空间重正化随机Allen-Cahn方程的确定性骨架的单调行波解，并分析了其谱性质
AI.motivation: 研究二维空间重正化随机Allen-Cahn方程的确定性骨架，该方程在相变、界面动力学等领域有重要应用，需要处理小正则化参数δ下的渐近行为
AI.techniques: 行波构造、小参数渐近分析、加权空间中的谱分析、重正化技术、单调性方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对所有充分小的δ>0构造了连接重正化平衡点的单调行波解；2. 推导了波剖面和速度的小δ渐近描述；3. 在加权空间中证明了对称性诱导的特征值0与谱其余部分之间存在谱隙，且谱隙随重正化常数线性增长
AI.significance: 为二维随机Allen-Cahn方程的动力学行为提供了确定性骨架的严格数学分析，谱隙结果对稳定性分析和长时间行为研究具有重要意义

title: Modeling of a non-Newtonian thin film passing a thin porous medium
summary: This theoretical study deals with asymptotic behavior of a coupling between a thin film of fluid and an adjacent thin porous medium. We assume that the size of the microstructure of the porous medium is given by a small parameter $0<\ep\ll 1$, the thickness of the thin porous medium is defined by a parameter $0<h_\ep\ll 1$, and the thickness of the thin film is defined by a small parameter $0<η_\ep\ll 1$, where $h_\ep$ and $η_\ep$ are devoted to tend to zero when $\ep\to 0$. In this paper, we consider the case of a non-Newtonian fluid governed by the incompressible Stokes equations with power law viscosity of flow index $r\in (1, +\infty)$, and we prove that there exists a critical regime, which depends on $r$, between $\ep$, $η_\ep$ and $h_\ep$. More precisely, in this critical regime given by $h_\ep\approx η_\ep^{2r-1\over r-1}\ep^{-{r\over r-1}}$, we prove that the effective flow when $\ep\to 0$ is described by a 1D Darcy law coupled with a 1D Reynolds law.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了非牛顿流体在薄多孔介质与薄流体膜耦合系统中的渐近行为，发现了依赖于流变指数的临界尺度关系。
AI.motivation: 研究薄多孔介质与相邻薄流体膜耦合系统的渐近行为，其中多孔介质微观结构尺度ε、多孔介质厚度h_ε和流体膜厚度η_ε均为小参数，需要理解这些尺度参数趋于零时的有效流动行为。
AI.techniques: 使用渐近分析方法、多尺度展开技术，结合非牛顿流体力学（幂律流变模型）和孔隙尺度流动理论，通过尺度参数分析建立临界尺度关系。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了存在依赖于流变指数r的临界尺度关系：h_ε ≈ η_ε^{(2r-1)/(r-1)} ε^{-r/(r-1)}，在该临界状态下，当ε→0时有效流动由一维达西定律与一维雷诺定律耦合描述。
AI.significance: 为理解非牛顿流体在复杂多尺度系统中的流动行为提供了理论框架，对微流体、生物流体力学和工业应用中的多孔介质-流体耦合问题有重要理论意义。

title: Asymptotic analysis of the Navier-Stokes equations in a thin domain with power law slip boundary conditions
summary: This theoretical study deals with the Navier-Stokes equations posed in a 3D thin domain with thickness $0<\ep\ll 1$, assuming power law slip boundary conditions, with an anisotropic tensor, on the bottom. This condition, introduced in (Djoko {\it et al.} {\it Comput. Math. Appl.} 128 (2022) 198--213), represents a generalization of the Navier slip boundary condition. The goal is to study the influence of the power law slip boundary conditions with an anisotropic tensor of order $\ep^{γ\over s}$, with $γ\in \mathbb{R}$ and flow index $1<s<2$, on the behavior of the fluid with thickness $\ep$ by using asymptotic analysis when $\ep\to 0$, depending on the values of $γ$. As a result, we deduce the existence of a critical value of $γ$ given by $γ_s^*=3-2s$ and so, three different limit boundary conditions are derived. The critical case $γ=γ_s^*$ corresponds to a limit condition of type power law slip. The supercritical case $γ>γ_s^*$ corresponds to a limit boundary condition of type perfect slip. The subcritical case $γ<γ_s^*$ corresponds to a limit boundary condition of type no-slip.

AI.tldr: 研究了三维薄域中Navier-Stokes方程在幂律滑移边界条件下的渐近行为，发现了临界指数γ_s^*=3-2s决定三种不同的极限边界条件
AI.motivation: 研究厚度为ε的三维薄域中Navier-Stokes方程在幂律滑移边界条件下的渐近行为，该边界条件是Navier滑移条件的推广，包含各向异性张量和幂律指数s，旨在分析当ε→0时不同γ值对流体行为的影响
AI.techniques: 使用渐近分析方法，分析薄域极限ε→0时的行为，考虑各向异性张量ε^{γ/s}的尺度效应，通过参数γ与临界值γ_s^*的比较进行分类分析
AI.main_theorems: 发现临界值γ_s^*=3-2s，根据γ与γ_s^*的关系得到三种不同的极限边界条件：临界情况γ=γ_s^*对应幂律滑移型极限条件，超临界情况γ>γ_s^*对应完美滑移型极限条件，次临界情况γ<γ_s^*对应无滑移型极限条件
AI.significance: 建立了薄域中幂律滑移边界条件的系统渐近理论，揭示了各向异性张量尺度参数γ对极限行为的关键影响，为薄域流体动力学中的边界条件建模提供了理论框架，推广了Djoko等人的工作

title: Estimates for the distances between solutions to Kolmogorov equations with diffusion matrices of low regularity
summary: We obtain estimates for the weighted $L^1$-norm of the difference of two probability solutions to Kolmogorov equations in terms of the difference of the diffusion matrices and the drifts. Unlike the previously known results, our estimate does not involve Sobolev derivatives of solutions and coefficients. The diffusion matrices are supposed to be non-singular, bounded and satisfy the Dini mean oscillation condition.

AI.tldr: 建立了Kolmogorov方程两个概率解加权L1范数差异的估计，无需涉及解的Sobolev导数或系数导数
AI.motivation: 研究Kolmogorov方程概率解对系数扰动的稳定性估计，避免传统方法中需要Sobolev导数的限制，为扩散矩阵和漂移项变化提供更直接的定量控制
AI.techniques: 使用加权L1范数估计，要求扩散矩阵非奇异、有界且满足Dini平均振荡条件，避免了Sobolev空间导数工具
AI.main_theorems: 建立了两个概率解加权L1范数差异的上界估计，该估计仅依赖于扩散矩阵和漂移项的差异，不涉及解的Sobolev导数或系数的导数
AI.significance: 为Kolmogorov方程解的稳定性分析提供了新的工具，简化了系数扰动下的定量估计，在随机微分方程、概率论和数学物理中有重要应用

title: Homogenization of the random Neumann sieve problem under minimal assumptions on the size of the perforations
summary: We study the limit behavior of the solutions to the Neumann sieve problem for the Poisson equation when the sieve-holes are randomly distributed according to a stationary marked point process. We determine the optimal stochastic integrability for the random radii of the perforations for which stochastic homogenization takes place despite the presence of clustering holes.

AI.tldr: 研究了泊松方程Neumann筛问题在随机穿孔分布下的极限行为，确定了随机穿孔半径的最优随机可积性条件
AI.motivation: 研究具有随机分布穿孔的Neumann筛问题的极限行为，特别关注当穿孔存在聚类现象时，随机均匀化过程是否仍然成立，以及需要什么样的随机可积性条件
AI.techniques: 随机均匀化理论、标记点过程、Neumann筛问题分析、随机穿孔半径的随机可积性分析、聚类孔洞的处理方法
AI.main_theorems: 确定了随机穿孔半径的最优随机可积性条件，在此条件下即使存在聚类孔洞，随机均匀化过程仍然发生
AI.significance: 扩展了随机均匀化理论到具有聚类孔洞的穿孔介质问题，为随机多孔介质中的偏微分方程分析提供了理论基础

title: Qualitative properties of blowing-up solutions of nonlinear elliptic equations with critical Sobolev exponent
summary:
In this paper, we are concerned with the critical elliptic equation \begin{equation}\label{kx} \left\lbrace\begin{aligned}
  &-Δu=u^{p}+εκ(x)u^{q}\quad\hspace{2mm} \mbox{in}~~Ω,
  \\&u>0\quad \quad\quad\quad\quad\quad\quad\quad\hspace{1mm}\hspace{0.5mm}~\mbox{in}~~Ω
  \\&u=0\quad \quad\quad\quad\quad\quad\quad\quad\hspace{1mm}\hspace{0.5mm}~\mbox{on}~\partialΩ,
  \end{aligned} \right. \end{equation} where $Ω$ is a smooth bounded domain in $\mathbb{R}^N$ for $N\geq3$, $p=(N+2)/(N-2)$, $1<q<p$, $ε>0$ is a small parameter. If $κ(x)=1$, by applying the various identities of derivatives of Green's function and the rescaled functions, with blow-up analysis, we first provide a number of estimates on the first $(N+2)$-eigenvalues and their corresponding eigenfunctions, and prove the qualitative behavior of the eigenpairs $(λ_{i,ε}, v_{i,ε})$ to the eigenvalue problem of the elliptic equation \eqref{kx} for $i=1,\cdots,N+2$. As a consequence, we have that the Morse index of a single-bubble solution is $N+1$ if the Hessian matrix of the Robin function is nondegenerate at a blow-up point. Moreover, if $κ(x)\in C^2(\overlineΩ)$, we show that, for $ε>0$ small, the asymptotic behavior of the solutions and nondegeneracy of the solutions for the problem \eqref{kx} under a nondegeneracy condition on the blow-up point of a "mixture" of both the matrix $κ(x)$ and Robin function.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了临界椭圆方程在扰动项下的单气泡解，通过特征值分析和爆破技术证明了Morse指数为N+1，并建立了在非退化条件下的解的非退化性。
AI.motivation: 研究临界指数椭圆方程在扰动项下的解的性质，特别是单气泡解的Morse指数和非退化性，这对于理解临界椭圆方程解的稳定性和分支现象具有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 使用Green函数导数恒等式、重标度函数、爆破分析、特征值估计、Morse指数计算，以及Robin函数和κ(x)矩阵的混合非退化条件分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当κ(x)=1时，证明了前(N+2)个特征值和特征函数的估计，得到单气泡解的Morse指数为N+1（若Robin函数的Hessian矩阵在爆破点非退化）；2. 当κ(x)∈C²时，建立了在混合非退化条件下解的渐近行为和非退化性。
AI.significance: 该结果深化了对临界椭圆方程扰动问题解结构的理解，为研究解的稳定性、分支理论和相关变分问题提供了重要工具，特别是在处理非齐次扰动项时具有理论价值。

title: Parabolic free boundary phase transition and mean curvature flow
summary:
It is known that there is a strong relation between the parabolic Allen--Cahn equation and the mean curvature flow, in the sense that the parabolic Allen--Cahn equation can be considered as a ``diffused" mean curvature flow. In this work, we derive a forced mean curvature flow
  \[
  v=-H-\partial_ν\log |\nabla u|+f(u)/|\nabla u|,
  \]
  satisfied by level surfaces of any solution to the nonlinear parabolic equation
  \[
  \partial_tu=Δu-f(u).
  \]
  Moreover, we introduce the notion of the inner gradient flow, and unify parabolic free boundary problems in the gradient flow framework. Finally, we consider the parabolic free boundary Allen--Cahn equation
  \[
  \left\{
  \begin{alignedat}{2}
  \partial_tu&=Δu\quad&&\text{in}\quad\{|u|<1\}
  |\nabla u|&=1/ε\quad&&\text{on}\quad\partial\{|u|<1\},
  \end{alignedat}
  \right.
  \]
  and confirm that under reasonable assumptions, the $C^α$ norm of the forcing term $\partial_ν\log|\nabla u|$ converges to zero at an algebraic rate as $ε\rightarrow 0$, uniformly in time. This implies that the parabolic free boundary Allen--Cahn equation converges to the mean curvature flow, uniformly (in $ε$ and in time) in the $C^{2,α}$ sense.

AI.tldr: 建立了抛物型自由边界Allen-Cahn方程与平均曲率流之间的统一梯度流框架，并证明了前者以代数速率收敛到后者
AI.motivation: 抛物型Allen-Cahn方程与平均曲率流之间存在深刻联系，前者可视为后者的"弥散"版本。本文旨在建立更精确的数学联系，特别是通过自由边界问题框架，统一抛物型自由边界问题与梯度流理论
AI.techniques: 推导了水平集满足的强迫平均曲率流方程；引入内梯度流概念；建立抛物型自由边界问题的梯度流统一框架；使用正则性估计和渐近分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 推导出非线性抛物方程解的等值面满足的强迫平均曲率流方程；2. 建立抛物型自由边界Allen-Cahn方程到平均曲率流的收敛性，证明强迫项以代数速率收敛到零；3. 在C^{2,α}意义下获得一致收敛结果
AI.significance: 为抛物型自由边界问题提供了统一的梯度流理论框架，建立了Allen-Cahn方程与平均曲率流之间的精确数学联系，为相变界面动力学研究提供了新的分析工具

title: On Viscosity Solutions of Hamilton-Jacobi Equations in the Wasserstein space and the Vanishing Viscosity Limit
summary:
The aim of this article is twofold. First, we develop a unified framework for viscosity solutions to both first-order Hamilton-Jacobi equations and semilinear Hamilton-Jacobi equations driven by the idiosyncratic operator. Second, we establish a vanishing-viscosity limit-extending beyond the classical control-theoretic setting-for solutions of semilinear Hamilton-Jacobi equations, proving their convergence to the corresponding first-order solution as the idiosyncratic noise vanishes. Our approach provides an optimal convergence rate.
  We also present some results of independent interest. These include existence theorems for the first-order equation, obtained through an appropriate Hopf-Lax representation, and a useful description of the action of the idiosyncratic operator on geodesically convex functions.

AI.tldr: 建立了统一框架处理一阶和半线性Hamilton-Jacobi方程的粘性解，并证明了半线性方程解在异质性噪声消失时收敛于一阶方程解的最优收敛速率。
AI.motivation: 研究由异质性算子驱动的Hamilton-Jacobi方程的粘性解理论，建立一阶方程和半线性方程的统一框架，并探索超越经典控制理论框架的粘性消失极限问题。
AI.techniques: 粘性解理论、Hopf-Lax表示、异质性算子作用分析、最优收敛速率估计、几何凸函数分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 一阶和半线性Hamilton-Jacobi方程粘性解的统一框架；2) 半线性方程解收敛于一阶方程解的粘性消失极限定理；3) 一阶方程存在性定理（通过Hopf-Lax表示）；4) 异质性算子作用于测地凸函数的描述。
AI.significance: 扩展了粘性解理论的应用范围，为异质性算子驱动的Hamilton-Jacobi方程提供了系统分析框架，建立了超越经典控制理论的收敛结果，具有重要的理论意义和应用潜力。

title: Computation and analysis of global solution curves for super-critical equations
summary:
We study analytical and computational aspects for Dirichlet problem on the unit ball $B$: $|x|<1$ in $R^n$, modeled on the equation \[ Δu +λ\left(u^p+u^q \right)=0, \;\; \mbox{in $B$}, \;\; u=0 \s \mbox{on $\partial B$}, \] with a positive parameter $λ$, and $1<p<\frac{n+2}{n-2}<q$, where $\frac{n+2}{n-2}$ is the critical power. It turns out that a special role is played by the Lin-Ni equation [18], where $q=2p-1$ and $p>\frac{n}{n+2}$. This was already observed by I. Flores [6], who proved the existence of infinitely many ground state solutions. We study properties of infinitely many solution curves of this problem that are separated by these ground state solutions. We also study singular solutions (where $u(0)=\infty$), and again the Lin-Ni equation plays a special role. \medskip
  Super-critical equations are very challenging computationally: solutions exist only for very large $λ$, and curves of positive solutions make turns at very large values of $u(0)=||u||_{L^{\infty}}$. We overcome these difficulties by developing new results on singular solutions, and by using some delicate capabilities of {\em Mathematica} software.

AI.tldr: 研究单位球上带超临界指数的Dirichlet问题，揭示Lin-Ni方程的特殊作用，并发展计算超临界问题的数值方法
AI.motivation: 研究单位球上带超临界指数的椭圆方程Dirichlet问题，其中包含正参数λ和两个指数1<p<(n+2)/(n-2)<q，临界指数(n+2)/(n-2)在问题中起关键作用。特别关注Lin-Ni方程(q=2p-1且p>n/(n+2))的特殊地位，该方程已被Flores证明存在无穷多基态解
AI.techniques: 结合分析方法和计算技术：使用奇异解理论分析解的结构，利用Mathematica软件进行精细数值计算，研究解曲线的分离性质，分析基态解对解曲线的分隔作用
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明Lin-Ni方程在Dirichlet问题中起特殊作用；2. 研究无穷多解曲线的性质及其被基态解分隔的结构；3. 分析奇异解(u(0)=∞)的行为；4. 发展计算超临界问题的新方法，克服解仅存在于大λ值、解曲线在极大u(0)处转折的困难
AI.significance: 为超临界椭圆方程的计算提供了新方法，揭示了Lin-Ni方程的特殊数学结构，深化了对带超临界指数非线性椭圆方程解的理解，为相关PDE问题的数值计算开辟了新途径

title: Proper solutions of the $1/H$-flow and the Green kernel of the $p$-Laplacian
summary: We show existence and optimal growth estimate for the weak inverse mean curvature flow issuing from a point, on manifolds with certain curvature and isoperimetric conditions. Some of the results are obtained by proving new decay estimates for the Green kernel of the $p$-Laplacian which fix a gap in the literature. Additionally, we address the convergence of $p$-capacitary potentials to the inverse mean curvature flow with outer obstacle.

AI.tldr: 证明了在满足特定曲率和等周条件的流形上，从点出发的弱逆平均曲率流的存在性和最优增长估计
AI.motivation: 研究从点出发的逆平均曲率流的存在性和性质，这是几何分析中的重要问题，特别是在广义相对论和黎曼几何中有应用
AI.techniques: 使用p-拉普拉斯算子的格林核衰减估计，填补了文献中的空白；采用位势理论和障碍问题方法处理收敛性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在满足特定曲率和等周条件的流形上，从点出发的弱逆平均曲率流的存在性定理；2. 最优增长估计；3. p-容度位势收敛到带外障碍的逆平均曲率流
AI.significance: 填补了p-拉普拉斯算子格林核衰减估计的文献空白，为逆平均曲率流理论提供了新的存在性和收敛性结果，在几何分析和广义相对论中有重要应用

title: Existence and regularity for perturbed Stokes system with critical drift in 2D
summary: We consider a perturbed Stokes system with critical divergence-free drift in a bounded Lipschitz domain in $R^2$, with sufficiently small Lipschitz constant L. It extends our previous work in $\Bbb R^n, n\ge 3$, to two-dimensional case. For large drift in weak $L^2$ space, we prove unique existence of q-weak solutions for force in $L^q$ with q close to 2. Moreover, for drift in $L^2(\Bbb R^2)$ we prove the unique existence of $W^{1,2}$ solutions for arbitrarily large L. Using similar methods we can also prove analogous results for scalar equations with divergence-free drifts in weak $L^2$ space.

AI.tldr: 将三维以上扰动Stokes系统的临界漂移结果推广到二维情形，证明了弱L^2空间中大漂移下q-弱解的存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究二维有界Lipschitz域中带临界散度自由漂移的扰动Stokes系统，将作者之前在n≥3维空间的结果推广到二维情形，处理二维空间特有的数学困难
AI.techniques: 使用弱L^2空间理论，q-弱解框架，W^{1,2}正则性分析，以及处理临界漂移的扰动方法，特别针对二维空间调整分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1) 弱L^2空间中大漂移下，对接近2的q，L^q外力存在q-弱解的唯一存在性；2) L^2(ℝ²)漂移下，对任意大Lipschitz常数L，W^{1,2}解的唯一存在性；3) 类似结果可推广到带散度自由漂移的标量方程
AI.significance: 填补了二维临界漂移Stokes系统理论的空白，为二维流体力学中的大漂移问题提供了严格数学基础，方法具有普适性可应用于其他椭圆型方程
